title: Notifications - Device charging
scenario: Charging notification for headset appears only when app is in background, showing headset name and "Charging" text, and redirects to Poly Lens home screen on tap.
steps: Launch the app and connect any Headset (ensure Headset is not fully charged).
Put the app in the background.
expected: Notification about charging headset appears containing the name of the headset and "Charging" text. Clicking on the notification redirects the user to the Poly Lens application - Home screen of the device.
